message: No active clearinghouse connection is configured.
whyItMatters: The clearinghouse connection holds the credentials and submitter identifiers needed to send 837 claims and run 270 eligibility checks. Nothing can be transmitted without it.
resolution: Configure and activate the clearinghouse connection on the Clearinghouse settings page.

message: Clearinghouse submitter ID is not configured.
whyItMatters: The submitter ID identifies your organization to the clearinghouse on every ISA/GS envelope. Without it, transactions are rejected immediately.
resolution: Enter the submitter ID assigned by your clearinghouse on the Clearinghouse settings page.

message: Clearinghouse receiver ID is not configured.
whyItMatters: The receiver ID identifies the clearinghouse on the ISA envelope. Without it, transactions cannot be addressed correctly.
resolution: Enter the receiver ID provided by your clearinghouse on the Clearinghouse settings page.

message: ISA usage indicator is not 'T' (test) or 'P' (production).
whyItMatters: The ISA usage indicator must be either T or P. Any other value will fail X12 envelope parsing at the clearinghouse.
resolution: Set the usage indicator to 'T' for testing or 'P' for production on the Clearinghouse settings page.

message: Eligibility service type code is missing.
whyItMatters: The X12 270 service type code defaults to 98 (Health Benefit Plan Coverage). Without it, eligibility requests will be rejected or return incomplete coverage.
resolution: Set the eligibility service type code (default 98) on the Clearinghouse settings page.

message: Clearinghouse is in live mode but has no stored credentials.
whyItMatters: Live mode submissions require real credentials. Without them, every transmission will fail authentication.
resolution: Either switch the connection to test mode or store the live credentials on the Clearinghouse settings page.
